server.name: time-server
server.instructions: Provides the current time and timezone conversions. Read-only; performs no network or filesystem access.

tools.name: get_current_time
tools.description: Return the current time for a given IANA timezone.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name, for example America/New_York.

tools.name: list_timezones
tools.description: List the supported IANA timezone identifiers.
